titleStmt.title: SII 7.334: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 334. (A.R. No. 142-A of 1901). ON A SLAB LYING IN FRONT OF THE ENTRANCE INTO THE ENCLOSURE OF THE SOMANATHA TEMPLE AT THE SAME VILLAGE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipataĒ namaḥ . śrī namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbi
caṁdracāmaracāravē . trayilōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrī . ja
yābdhuya śakavaruśa 1391 neya va¨rttamāna vikruti saṁvatsara lū śrīma(ṁ)nmahārājā
dhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa virupākṣarāyamahārāyaru vijayānagariya śiṁhvāsanadalli kuḷittu
saktalava¨rnnāśramadha¨rmmaṁgaḷanu pratipālisuva A
virupākṣarāyamahārāya
ḍeyara nirūpadiṁda viṭharasavoḍeyaru bārakūru rāyamahārā
yarige kī¨rtti pā¨rjita Āyuru sōmōpa
rāga puṁṇyakāladalū māḍida dha¨r(ṁ)maśāsana jaṁnayaga
ḷa makaḷu dēvarasarige brahmavaragrāmada mūḍa bhāgadalu
varaha ga 60 varaha Akṣāradalū Āṟuvatu varaha
dhārāpo¨rvakavāgi dhāreya neṟadu koṭa
sukhadiṁ bhōgisubahiri Eṁdu
vivara mahadēva Ugaḷura
laṁ beṭu mu 1 saṁkaranaya
bhūmige Aruvāramulada gade yipa
mu 1 du kāmaya mane hādimēlaṇa beṭu mu 1
mu 2 . srīdhara hēraḷa kaṇiya seṭeya mūḍa muṁ Āṁtu
yiṁtī bayalavoḷage hiriyagade mu 3 paḍuva ma tiraṇabeṭu bayaloḷa
hādi mūḍa maneya baḷiya gade mu 1 ha 5 Āṁtu mū dēvuṁgu
ga Aḍiyagade bayaloḷa makisaha muki dugātuṁgurapaḷiya hadi yiṁ mu 1 . dha¨rma
na baḷiyanū bāvi da teru gadeyiṁda mu 3 mēlaṇa beṭu mu 0 . baḷiyagadeyiṁda teṁ
kalu mu r ṁttadugāduṁgupaḷina mu 4 . mahadēva Uṁgurapaḷi hadi maṁjatanamu
Āruvāra gadeyoḷage mu 1 Āṁttu bhuvi mu 6 ... haṁdaḍiya kiṁna ha
tōṭada gadeyiṁ mu 1 mahadēva Uṁgurapaḷiya hādi yīsvaraseṭige bayalavoḷage baḷiya gade mu 1 dugāduṁgurapa
ḷiya hādi bhāgyaṇa bayala yīsaraseṭige Āruvāra huttina gade mu 3 maṁjattana mūḍa tōṭada gadde mu
Aṁtu mu 5 mahadēva [Uṁgura] paḷiya hādi Iriya kaṁṇige bayalavoḷage koḷakeya gade mēlaṇa maki saha mu 6 . 5 ha
ravattige mahadēva Uṁgurapaḷiya hādi hebāruvana baḷeyiṁ mānaṁ baḷiya gaddemāneya bāgila saha bayalu mu 2 ... 5 du
gāduṁgurapaḷiya kaṁnadiga sōvapana mūla kōṭiyappaganāyare mū bayaloḷage mu 2 . dugāduṁgura
paḷiya hādi hōvaḷiya gade mu 0 ... 6 śivakāvaḷiya gade mu 0 ... 6 Āṁtu mu 1 . 0 dugāduṁgurapaḷiya hādi
maṁjattana mūlava ge Aṁṇiseṭige Āruvāra bayalavoḷage mu 3 . mahadēva Uṁgurapaḷiya hādi śivakāvaḷiya ba
yalu mēlaṇa maki saha mu 2 ... mahādēva Uṁgurapaḷiya hādi gāṇaka taṁmmigerāmacūya beṭu bayalu
mēlaṇa makki saha mu 2 . 1 durādāṁgurapaḷiya hādi Ātana mūla mākaṁṇaseṭige Āruvāra bayalu mēlaṇa
mane saha mu 6 Aṁtu mu 8 . 1 mahadēva Uṁgurapaḷiya hadi mēṭikuḷagiṁda mu 0 . 8 dugāruṁgurapaḷiya hadi maṁgalūra
biṭinali bayalavoḷage kuḍe kaṁbha mu 2 mahadēva Uṁgurapaḷiya hadi rāmakaṁnaṁpaḷige baḍaga bayaloḷage ceṁ
gadeyiṁ mu 0 ... dugāduṁgurapaḷiya hadi bayalavoḷage Ābaleya gade mu 1 Āṁtu mu 3 ... sōviseṭiya maga Āṁṇise
ṭige yīsara Uṁgurapaḷiya hadi Aṭiyagade bāgilagade saha mu 4 madhye namakalliṁ tōṭada bāgila gade seha mu 1 . kōṭī
sarana mūla sōviseṭi kiṟuya magana Āruvāra mane bāgila gade beṭu saha mu 1 yīsara Uṁgurapaḷi hadi rāmakanaṁpa
ḷi bāgilu ga mu ... 1 yīsara Uṁgurapaḷiya hadidoḷu bharumaṇage maneya bāgila gade saha mu 0 ... 6 yīsara U
ṁgurapaḷiya hādi kiṟiyaṁṇiseṭi saṁkaracūyana kayalū koṁḍu bayaloḷage mūlada gadde mu 3 ...
gurapaḷiya hādi sēnabōvana mūle mūṟukēriya māthaṇaseṭiya Āruvāra bayalu mūla maki sa
havāgi mu 3 yīsura Uṁgurasaḷiya hādi kalukurana mūla maki bayalu saha mu 2 . yīsura Uṁgurapaḷi hādi Ā
ṟuvāra makki bayalu sahavāgi mu 1 ... 5 yīsvara Uṁgurapaḷi hādi kāvaḷige mane ṭhāvu makki sahavāgi mu 1
gurapaḷiya hādi bikku saṁkarana mūla bayilavoḷage guḷiya gade mu 2 ha 5 duggātuṁgara cūyapaḷiya hādi
maradabhūyana mūlamaṁṇa makkimu 1 . dugātuṁgurapaḷiya hadi hābaḷi mūla māriseṭige Āruvāra
mahādēva Uṁgurapaḷiya kaḷa koḷata taniṁdabayaloḷage dārigade mu 2 . makki sahavāgi
gāvidiya mūla mūḍa beṭinali mu 8 ... 3
dēva Uṁgurapaḷiya voppa Uṁgurapaḷiya voppa dugāduṁgura paḷiya voppa Ūra voppa vokkala voppa yidakke Āru
pāpakke hōharu . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harē
dānā chrēyō nrupālanaṁ . dānāt
sva¨rggamavāpnō mu 14 Ākṣāradalū
mane bayalu makki saha mu 1 . kanaṁghaseṭiyara bayalu makki sa
ha mu 04 . rāmakanaṁpaḷiya mūla ma hādi mulakaḷa bayaloḷa
ge mu 1
Digital edition of SII 7.334 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
